prompt: A Native American dreamcatcher with feathers and beads
prompt_refined: Generate a new image of a Native American dreamcatcher based on the visual style and intricate details of image 1. The artwork should be a black and white line art illustration, depicting a dreamcatcher with a prominent circular hoop containing a detailed woven web. Below the hoop, multiple strands should hang, each adorned with a variety of distinct feathers and round beads. A single chain of beads should extend upwards from the top of the hoop, as if for hanging. The dreamcatcher should be centrally positioned in the frame.
objects: multiple hanging strands below the hoop
single chain of beads extending upwards from the top of the hoop
dreamcatcher centrally positioned in the frame
